Hello World

I'm hosted with GitHub Pages.

Things I like about hosting on GitHub Pages:

  • It's free.
  • What is this weird error...(There was an extra > at the end of the first bullet point!)
  • I am forced to learn about version control, git.
  • No database. Well, this one is because I want to use a flat blogging system, Jekyll in particular.

The only thing I will need to do is add an email package at the domain registrar. Or maybe there's a better email service provider I can use...

Although I like the simplicity of having an email service at the domain registrar level. But there does seem to be a lot of spam that gets through and I really dislike that.
